_comment: Stryker mutation testing for the worker's pure modules. Mutates only the targets below and runs the node-runner Vitest config (which includes only pure tests). Workerd-pool tests are excluded so Stryker doesn't try to spawn miniflare per mutant — too slow and not the test surface that exercises these modules anyway.
_mutate_scope_note: agent-state-repo.ts deliberately NOT mutated here despite containing pure validators like isValidMaxAgents. Stryker's vitest-runner uses the pure-Node config (vitest.stryker.config.ts), and most of agent-state-repo.ts is workerd-only SQL — including it produces ~430 NoCoverage mutants that drown the signal. The pure validator IS covered by `apps/worker/test/properties.test.ts` (run via the same node-runner config). Future: extract pure validators into their own module to make this targetable.
